response.justification: Candidate has notable geospatial domain experience (GISCollective, Green Map) and prior low-latency systems work at Sociomantic with DLang, which transfers conceptually to C++/Rust pipeline work. However, modern C++ experience is thin and dated (roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 plus a university thesis), and there is no Rust experience. Recent years have been TypeScript/Node.js full-stack rather than systems programming, so the core required language skill is a significant gap despite strong adjacent skills.
strengths: Geospatial/GIS domain experience via GISCollective and Green Map
High-throughput, low-latency systems background at Sociomantic
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: Modern C++ experience is minimal and over a decade old
Recent roles are TypeScript/Node full-stack, not systems-level
